overview:
## Return Value

A new behavior object. To assign a behavior to an agent, use the agent’s [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent/behavior] property.

## Discussion

The new behavior contains the specified behaviors, each with a weight of `1.0`. To change an individual behavior’s weight after creating the composite behavior, keep a reference to that behavior and use the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKCompositeBehavior/setWeight(_:for:)] method.

For more information, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172].

# init(behaviors:)

**Initializer**

Creates a composite behavior from the specified individual behaviors.

## Declaration

```swift
convenience init(behaviors: [GKBehavior])
```

## Parameters

- **behaviors**: An array of behavior objects.

## Return Value

A new behavior object. To assign a behavior to an agent, use the agent’s [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent/behavior] property.

## Discussion

The new behavior contains the specified behaviors, each with a weight of `1.0`. To change an individual behavior’s weight after creating the composite behavior, keep a reference to that behavior and use the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKCompositeBehavior/setWeight(_:for:)] method.

For more information, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172].

## Creating a Composite Behavior

- **init(behaviors:andWeights:)**: Creates a behavior with the specified behaviors and weights.
